experiments.name: Search Intelligence paid audit validation
experiments.hypothesis: At least one ecommerce operator will pay for a manually delivered search and PLP audit before a full software product exists.
experiments.method: Prepare a narrow audit offer, sample report structure, qualification criteria, price proposal, delivery checklist, and approval request for outreach. Do not send outreach or charge customers without approval.
successCriteria: Human approves a specific outreach or warm-introduction path.
At least one unrelated prospect accepts a paid audit or gives a concrete reason for rejection.
Findings from delivery show at least three repeatable checks worth automating.
stopCriteria: No approved outreach path is available.
Prospects reject the pain or budget after five qualified conversations.
Audit delivery cannot be completed without prohibited data access.
experiments.nextAction: Draft the audit offer and sample report template as a non-outreach artifact.
